description: The signal envelope the Decision Layer's Signal Engine ingests. Aligns to DecisionObject in src/decision/decisionLayer.ts — the connector produces the INPUT to engine 1 (Signal), not a finished DecisionObject.

signal_envelope.entity_key: string — date-independent join key (REQUIRED for Decision→Outcome attribution)
signal_envelope.domain: domain id (domain-registry) — NOT the display name
signal_envelope.metric: canonical metric key (metric-registry) — the domain primary_metric

decision_object_handoff.note: Signal Engine maps signal_envelope -> DecisionObject.signal (string) + seeds context from sibling measures (labels via metric-registry).
